items.title: Show HN: Sigmashake Desktop – AI Coding Agent Guardrails
items.summary: SigmaShake Desktop - Guardrails for YOLO AI coding agents Your AI will use the wrong tool, nuke your database, force push to main because it won't respect your markdown instructions One ruleset, every major AI coding tool, local, no cloud, no sandbox Open to hearing feedback. Free to use BuildingInPublic live on twitch and youtube as well. Feel free to hangout and say Hi! Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48103540 Points: 1 # Comments: 1
